description:
Paste clipboard data into files and copy file contents directly via hotkey or context menu


What's Changed
- Add option to enable clipboard patching only for images #88
- Add setting to disable live clipboard updates by @chandrath in #89
- Fix a bug where multiple equal formats on the clipboard caused a crash #96
- Translation updates by @VenusGirl @maicol07 hypnotichemionus4 in #87 #90 #91 #92
Full Changelog: v5.5...v5.6
